title: I'm The Creaker, Baby
description: It's the creaking but with Joker make up and he's called The Creaker, what do you want from me?
body:
Something came over me, like a demon or some eldritch beast and put this image in my head. I can't explain it, and I'm not sure what I'm meant to even write to describe this. It's the creaking but with Joker make up and he's called The Creaker, what do you want from me? I don't know, months ago I heard the name "the creaking" and "The Creaker" popped into my head instead and I've been unable to call it "the creaking" in real life, and I have to explain what "The Creaker" is and why "I'm da Creaker, BABY" is a vocal stim. 

Shoutout to my partner who helped me set this up, but for reasons unknown to me they do not want their name attached to this.
